reasoning: Experience duration: Over 12 years of software development experience, with 6+ years in full-stack roles, meeting the seniority requirement.

Primary stack alignment: Strong experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (mentioned in GISCollective and Optilyz roles). Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, but TypeScript and Node.js expertise suggests adaptability.

Backend diversity: Experience with Kotlin/Java (RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting) and Node.js, covering secondary stack requirements. Also worked with D and C++ for performance-critical tasks, demonstrating low-level and high-level language proficiency.
Database experience: MongoDB (Optilyz), SQL/MySQL (various roles), and PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned but likely covered by general SQL experience.
Cloud and DevOps: Docker experience (Altom Consulting, GISCollective), AWS CDK (Optilyz), and Kubernetes (GISCollective) align with containerization and cloud platform requirements.
AI agent development: Explicit mention of contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, meeting the AI agent development requirement.
Testing frameworks: Familiarity with testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest not explicitly named but TDD/pairing at RIDE Capital suggests testing practices). Playwright not mentioned.
Collaboration and processes: Experience with CI/CD (RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting), code reviews, and dev-ops infrastructure suggests strong engineering practices.
User-centric focus: GISCollective and Green Map projects show ability to translate user needs into technical solutions, aligning with product-collaboration requirements.
Gaps: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned; PostgreSQL and Playwright absent; less emphasis on relational database depth.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, covering core stack requirements.
Demonstrated ability to work with secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven contribution to AI agent infrastructure and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Primary stack mentions lack explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, though TypeScript/Node.js expertise suggests adaptability.
Relational database depth (PostgreSQL/MySQL) is less emphasized; MongoDB is the primary DB mentioned.
Playwright testing framework not mentioned; general testing practices are present but not framework-specific.
response.justification: Bogdan's extensive full-stack experience, adaptability across multiple languages, and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure strongly align with the role's core requirements. While specific mentions of Nest.js and Vitest are absent, his TypeScript/Node.js expertise and modern development practices mitigate this concern. Minor gaps in relational database depth and testing frameworks are balanced by his broader engineering experience.
